title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that enables users to define YAML-based agentic workflows running in isolated git worktrees with any model provider. The marketplace allows sharing and discovery of pre-tested AI coding workflows across users.
